# MEOK Hackathon — Q3 2026 | Open-Source Contribution Event

> MEOK Hackathon Q3 2026. 24-hour open-source contribution event. UK + EU. Augment the 32-server MCP compliance fleet. CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677. £1,000 in prizes.

## Overview
MEOK Hackathon — Q3 2026 | Open-Source Contribution Event is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
